column1: # DPA Player — 8 MB flash partition table
# Maximises the single application slot. Phase 1 target is to fit
# one firmware image into the largest possible region so we have
# Angular portal static bundle without having to stream from SD.
#   0x00e000 - 0x00ffff   otadata   (8 KB)    reserved so Phase 7 OTA drops in
#   - `factory` subtype because we have one app slot today. When OTA
#     is added in Phase 7 we'll split into ota_0 + ota_1.
#   - No SPIFFS or FAT data partition on internal flash — the SD
#     card is the sole user-data store. Saves flash for code/assets.
